entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the host crop affected by Fusarium wilt

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM F.SP.CICERI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes Fusarium wilt in chickpea

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A disease of chickpea caused by the pathogen Fusarium oxysporum f.sp.ciceri

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country from which the pathogen isolates were collected

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used to assess genetic variability and distinctiveness of pathogen isolates

entities.name: RAPDS
entities.description: Random Amplified Polymorphic DNA, a type of molecular marker used for genetic analysis

entities.name: AFLP
entities.description: Amplified Fragment Length Polymorphism, a molecular marker found to be more informative than RAPDs

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze similarity index data from molecular markers

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference among isolates of the Fusarium oxysporum f.sp.ciceri pathogen

entities.name: DNA POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The occurrence of two or more alternative forms of a DNA sequence, indicating rapid evolution of the pathogen
